workflow_state_contract.contract_note: Workflow-state keeps stage/status vocabulary only. Skill lookup lives in skill_catalog.

init.trigger_summary: Bootstrap a workspace, create Forge bootstrap docs, or normalize existing project docs to the Forge bootstrap standard.

brainstorming.trigger_summary: Feature direction, behavior change, visual/design work, approach comparison, or multi-subsystem decomposition.

writing-plans.trigger_summary: Approved design, clear requirement, or multi-step implementation needs an executable written plan.

executing-plans.trigger_summary: Written plan exists and the user wants inline implementation or task execution.

test-driven-development.trigger_summary: Feature, bugfix, regression, refactor, or behavior change has a viable harness before implementation.

using-git-worktrees.trigger_summary: Dirty repo, risky feature work, isolated plan execution, or parallel-safe branch/worktree need.

dispatching-parallel-agents.trigger_summary: Two or more independent tasks can run in parallel with disjoint write scopes.

subagent-driven-development.trigger_summary: Written plan has independent task packets suitable for fresh worker and reviewer lanes.

systematic-debugging.trigger_summary: Bug, regression, failing test, error, unexpected behavior, or prompt/agent behavior fix.

requesting-code-review.trigger_summary: Work is complete enough to review before merge, PR, handoff, or a ready claim.

receiving-code-review.trigger_summary: User, reviewer, CI, or another agent gives review feedback or requested changes.

verification-before-completion.trigger_summary: About to say done, fixed, ready, tests pass, mergeable, deployable, or complete.

finishing-a-development-branch.trigger_summary: Implementation and verification are complete enough to decide merge, PR, keep, or discard.

customize.trigger_summary: Durable response preferences, language, orthography, tone, pace, or repo-scoped Forge preference overrides need inspection or updates.

writing-skills.trigger_summary: Creating, editing, splitting, absorbing, testing, hardening, or deploying Forge or host skills.

codex: Continue the task we were working on yesterday and tell me the best next step.
antigravity: Continue the task we were working on yesterday and tell me the best next step.

codex: Save context for this task before I close the window.
antigravity: Save context for this task before I close the window.

codex: Create a short handover with the next step and verification already run.
antigravity: Create a short handover with the next step and verification already run.

session-management.trigger_summary: Resume, continue, restore context, save context, handover, or response personalization.

required_patterns: I verified: [fresh evidence]. Correct because [reason]. Fixed: [change].
I investigated: [evidence]. The current code stays because [reason].

rationalization_patterns: I did not run the exact check, but the change is small.
Test fail but it looks unrelated.
Could not reproduce, so it is probably okay.
Spec is basically clear, implementation can figure it out.

dispatch_reasons: Independent review lanes improve quality on medium and large work.
fallback_reasons: Reuse sequential lanes when host support is missing.

dispatch_reasons: Parallel workers accelerate disjoint packet execution.
fallback_reasons: Degrade to independent reviewers or sequential lanes when host support is missing.
